acupressure_points.name: Ly 1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Tonsil problems, inflammation or pain in the palate, swelling around the tonsils, issues in the surrounding and upper throat area, and difficulty swallowing food.
acupressure_points.location: Located in the palate area (roof of the mouth).

acupressure_points.name: Ly 1-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Diseases of the external, middle, and inner ear.
acupressure_points.location: Reference point for ear lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 1-2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Palatine tonsils, tubal tonsils, pharyngeal tonsils (respiratory), lingual tonsils, laryngeal tonsils, and lymphatic tonsil ring issues.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point for various tonsils.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Ear infections passing through the tubal tonsil, pus in the inner ear, or ruptured eardrum with pus drainage.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point associated with the tubal tonsil and throat infection drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Lymphatic issues of the upper and lower teeth and jaws, and the supermaxillary region.
acupressure_points.location: Reference point for upper and lower teeth and jaw lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 2a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Eye diseases.
acupressure_points.location: Reference point for eye lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Frontal sinus, maxillary sinus, sphenoid sinus, and ethmoid cell issues.
acupressure_points.location: Reference point for nose and sinus lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 4
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Lung diseases, pulmonary lymph vessel issues, and inflammation of the bronchial and tracheal lymph nodes.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for the lungs and mediastinal lymph glands.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 4a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Esophageal issues.
acupressure_points.location: Reference point for esophagus lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 4b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Laryngeal and lower pharyngeal (hypopharynx) issues.
acupressure_points.location: Reference point for larynx and trachea lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 5
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Heart and pericardium diseases, blockages in cardiac ganglia or coronary plexus, and detoxification of the heart's lymphatic system.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for heart and pericardium lymph vessels (located on the wrist area).

acupressure_points.name: Ly 6
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Skin diseases of the hands, lymph congestion (especially after mastectomy), breast cancer, and breast lumps or pain.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for the lymph vessels of the upper arm and hand.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 7 (Right)
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Mesenteric lymph gland issues.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for the mesenteric lymph glands.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 7 (Left)
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Intestinal diseases.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for the intestinal lymphatic trunk.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 8 (Left)
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Issues related to the mesocolic or mesosigmoid lymph nodes.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for lymph drainage of the left side of the intestines.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 8 (Right)
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Lymphatic issues at the origin (root) of the intestines.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for the root of the intestinal lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 9
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Lumps, abscesses, inflammation, or pus in the thyroid and thymus glands.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for thyroid and thymus endocrine gland lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 10
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Lumps or abscesses in the lumbar region of the back.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for lymph glands and trunk of the lumbar spine area.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 11
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Issues with the autonomous nervous system (brain/spine), endocrine glands (pituitary, thymus, thyroid), liver, gallbladder, pancreas, spleen, kidney, and stomach.
acupressure_points.location: Summated Measurement Point (SMP) for multiple vital organ systems (located on the neck/shoulder area).

acupressure_points.name: Ly 12
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Issues with the spine, back of the brain, kidneys, spleen, pancreas, stomach, and tonsils; also for lumbar degeneration (L1, 4, 5).
acupressure_points.location: SMP for epigastric lymph glands and coeliac lymph nodes (located on the neck/shoulder area).

acupressure_points.name: Ly 13
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Gallbladder/liver bile duct issues, sympathetic nerve issues, spinal marrow issues, ethmoid/sphenoid sinus issues, shoulder/arm/elbow/wrist pain, and anemia.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for nose bone lymph processes and liver lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: Ly 14
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Spine and spinal marrow issues, urinary and reproductive organ issues, pineal and adrenal gland issues, and maxillary/frontal sinus congestion.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for multi-organ balance and bladder channel lymph drainage.

acupressure_points.name: ND-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration in Lumbar (L1 to L5) and Sacral (S1 to S5) regions; issues with the lumbar/sacral marrow and nerves of the lower extremities (legs).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for the nerves of the lower body, including the lumbar and sacral spine.

acupressure_points.name: ND-1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Diseases of the entire autonomous nervous system, specifically the brain and the spinal cord (backbone).
acupressure_points.location: Summated Measurement Point (SMP) for the brain and spinal column.

acupressure_points.name: ND-1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Nerve degeneration in the hands, feet, and central nervous system; effective for disorders anywhere in the brain, spinal cord, or the 12 pairs of cranial nerves.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for nerve degeneration in the extremities and central nervous system.

acupressure_points.name: ND-1c
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Inflammation of the meninges (Meningitis), side effects caused by such inflammation, and treatment of the peritoneum.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the meninges surrounding the brain and spinal cord marrow.

acupressure_points.name: ND-2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the nerves in the neck, back, hands, and feet; also used for lymph congestion in the arms (when paired with Ly-6).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the nerves of the neck, back, hands, and feet.

acupressure_points.name: ND-3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the brain stem, cerebrum, and encephalon; used to diagnose and treat degeneration in these specific areas.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the brain stem and cerebral regions.

acupressure_points.name: ND-3a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the cranial nerves; disorders of the voluntary and involuntary nerve networks within the cranium.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for the voluntary nerve sub-centers (ganglia) of the head.

acupressure_points.name: ND-4
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: General disorders involving any of the 12 cranial nerves, such as issues with the olfactory, optic, oculomotor, trochlear, or trigeminal nerves.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for all 12 cranial nerves.

acupressure_points.name: AD-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Allergies of the lower body, including skin allergies of the legs, abdominal organ skin allergies, pelvic skin allergies, lower back skin allergies, and blood vessel allergies in the lower body. Specific for allergic gastric disorders (Gastropathy), intestinal tract issues, and colitis. Also a specific point for allergies of the urinary and reproductive organs.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the lower part of the body.

acupressure_points.name: AD-1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Treatment for allergies related to the autonomous nervous system, specifically the brain and spinal cord.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the autonomous nervous system.

acupressure_points.name: AD-1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Testing and treatment for allergies across the entire body; also used for urinary/genital allergies and tooth-related allergy issues.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for whole-body allergy testing and treatment.

acupressure_points.name: AD-1c
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Obstructions and hardening in arteries and veins. Used for treating arterial sclerosis (hardening of the arteries) and checking for blocked arteries. Recommended to treat allergies here before addressing arterial sclerosis.
acupressure_points.location: Summated Measurement Point (SMP) for blood vessel obstructions and hardening.

acupressure_points.name: AD-2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Allergies of the upper body, including the chest, throat, neck, hands, and arms. Useful for respiratory allergies (asthma), allergic myocarditis (heart muscle inflammation), and allergies caused by damp environments (fungus), turpentine, pesticides, animal hair/feathers, or pollen. Also indicated for Allergic Hay Fever.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the upper part of the body.

acupressure_points.name: AD-3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Allergies of the head and scalp, nasal cavity, paranasal sinuses, face, and hair. Used for tooth-related allergies, allergic hay fever, nasal inflammation, allergic migraines, and allergies of the eyes and oral cavity.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement point for allergies of the head and cranial regions.

acupressure_points.name: OR-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Parenchymal degenerative changes in all organs of the abdomen and pelvis; useful for treating cancer in these organs and chronic constipation.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the abdomen and pelvic regions.

acupressure_points.name: OR-1-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Cellular or organ degeneration leading to imbalances in the lymphatic system; used for diagnosis and treatment of the degree of organ degeneration.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for cellular and organ-level lymphatic imbalances.

acupressure_points.name: OR-1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of organs caused by instabilities in the autonomous nervous system (specifically due to issues in spinal nerve distribution).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for organ degeneration related to autonomous system instability.

acupressure_points.name: OR-1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of all organs in the body, excluding the endocrine glands and mammary (breast) glands.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for general organ degeneration.

acupressure_points.name: OR-1c
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the entire peritoneum (mucus lining of the abdominal cavity); used for ulcers, cancer resulting from ulcers, and organ displacement (ptosis).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the whole peritoneum.

acupressure_points.name: OR-1d
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the pleura (lining of the lungs); used for treating lung cancer and tuberculosis (T.B.) infections.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the pleura of the lungs.

acupressure_points.name: OR-2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the organs of the chest, throat, and neck.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the chest, throat, and neck regions.

acupressure_points.name: OR-3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the organs in the head; used for treating tumors, cancer, blood clots, and swelling in the head.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the organs of the head.

acupressure_points.name: OR-4
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the organs located in the abdomen and pelvis.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the abdominal and pelvic organs.

acupressure_points.name: OR-5
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the organs in the throat, neck, and chest.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the throat, neck, and chest organs.

acupressure_points.name: OR-6
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the organs located in the head. Treatment should be supplemented with Vitamin A and the consumption of green vegetables and fruits.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the organs within the head.

acupressure_points.name: JD-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the joints of the lower body, including the hip, knee, and ankle joints. Also useful for treating general lower body joint pain and stiffness.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the joints of the lower extremities (legs).

acupressure_points.name: JD-1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Joint degeneration caused by imbalances in the autonomous nervous system (brain and spinal cord).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for joint issues related to the autonomous nervous system.

acupressure_points.name: JD-1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration affecting joints throughout the entire body; used as a primary point for testing and treating systemic joint issues.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for the entire joint system of the body.

acupressure_points.name: JD-2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the joints in the upper body, specifically the shoulders, elbows, and wrists. Useful for treating chronic inflammation and limited mobility in the arms.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the joints of the upper extremities (arms).

acupressure_points.name: JD-3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the jaw joints (temporomandibular joints) and joints within the head and neck region. Specifically indicated for treating jaw pain, clicking, and restricted movement (TMJ disorders).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the joints of the jaw and head.

acupressure_points.name: Fib D1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the fibrous tissues of the lower body, including the legs, hips, and lower back. Useful for treating chronic stiffness and loss of flexibility in the connective tissues of these areas.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the fibrous tissues of the lower extremities (legs).

acupressure_points.name: Fib D1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Fibrous tissue degeneration specifically linked to issues in the autonomous nervous system (brain and spinal cord).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for fibrous tissue issues related to the autonomous nervous system.

acupressure_points.name: Fib D1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of fibrous tissues throughout the entire body; used as a key point for general testing and treatment of systemic fibrous tissue disorders.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for the entire fibrous tissue system of the body.

acupressure_points.name: Fib D2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the fibrous tissues of the upper body, such as the shoulders, arms, and hands. Effective for treating conditions like frozen shoulder or chronic tendon stiffness in the upper limbs.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the fibrous tissues of the upper extremities (arms).

acupressure_points.name: Fib D3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degeneration of the fibrous tissues in the head and neck area. Indicated for treating chronic tension and degenerative changes in the connective tissues of the scalp and neck.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the fibrous tissues of the head and neck region.

acupressure_points.name: SK-1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the skin of the lower body, including the legs, hips, and lower abdominal area. Useful for treating chronic skin conditions and aging-related skin issues in these regions.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the skin of the lower extremities (legs).

acupressure_points.name: SK-1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Skin degeneration linked to imbalances in the autonomous nervous system (brain and spinal cord).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for skin issues related to the autonomous nervous system.

acupressure_points.name: SK-1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the skin across the entire body; used as a primary point for testing and treating systemic skin degeneration.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for the entire skin system of the body.

acupressure_points.name: SK-2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the skin of the upper body, specifically the chest, arms, and hands. Indicated for treating various skin disorders in the upper limbs.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the skin of the upper extremities (arms).

acupressure_points.name: SK-3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the skin of the head and neck. Specifically useful for treating skin issues on the face and scalp.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the skin of the head and neck region.

acupressure_points.name: Fat D1
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the fatty tissues of the lower body, including the legs and hips. Useful for managing conditions related to localized fat metabolism and degenerative changes in the adipose layers of the lower extremities.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the fatty tissues of the lower extremities (legs).

acupressure_points.name: Fat D1a
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Fatty tissue degeneration specifically associated with imbalances or disorders in the autonomous nervous system (brain and spinal cord).
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for fatty tissue issues related to the autonomous nervous system.

acupressure_points.name: Fat D1b
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in fatty tissues throughout the entire body; serves as the primary point for systemic testing and treatment of fat tissue degeneration and metabolism issues.
acupressure_points.location: Control Measurement Point (CMP) for the entire fatty tissue system of the body.

acupressure_points.name: Fat D2
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the fatty tissues of the upper body, including the arms, hands, and chest area. Used for treating adipose tissue disorders in the upper limbs.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the fatty tissues of the upper extremities (arms).

acupressure_points.name: Fat D3
acupressure_points.diseases_signs: Degenerative changes in the fatty tissues of the head and neck. Indicated for conditions affecting the adipose layers of the face and cranial regions.
acupressure_points.location: Measurement Point (MP) for the fatty tissues of the head and neck region.
